version_description: The other version has lyrics that are way off. it affects the song's meaning.

versions.version_description: The tab had a few missing chords, but also - the middle 8 was definitely wrong.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

Tabbed by:camir77
Twitter/ig:amirbiskandar

[Verse]
